findings.description: The property name `sql` — the only property in section d) BasicDbAccessExceptionFactory's table — is absent from the s1 hints array. A user asking about DB connection validation SQL configuration would expect this term to surface the section.
findings.source_evidence: Source section d): `sql(必須) | データベースへの接続が有効かどうかを問い合わせるためのSQL文を設定する。`
